description: You are the Security Director at ACME Corp preparing the monthly visitor traffic analysis for December 2025. Generate a comprehensive report including the total visitor count for December 2025, a breakdown of visits by badge type (Visitor, Contractor, Vendor), and the top 3 host departments ranked by visitor traffic. Export this analysis to /home/ga/Desktop/dec2025_visitor_analysis.csv. The report must include total counts, per-badge-type counts, and top department names with their visitor counts.
